debug_info.goal:
case inl
F : Frame
φ ψ : Formula ℕ
inst✝ : LO.Propositional.Kripke2.Frame.IsPiecewiseConnected F
V : Valuation F
x y : { toFrame := F, Val := V }.World
Rxy : x ≺ y
hy₁ : y ⊧ φ
hy₂ : y ⊭ ψ
z : { toFrame := F, Val := V }.World
Rxz : x ≺ z
hz₁ : z ⊧ ψ
hz₂ : z ⊭ φ
Ryz : y ≺ z
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
sorry
      }
    exact h₇
  have h₅ : y ⊣ ψ := by assumption
  exfalso
  apply h₄
  h₅

should get y ⊥ φ (because y ≺ z ⇒ φ(y) ⇒ φ(z))
    -- Contradiction with y ⊧ φ
    have h₈ : z ⊥ φ := hz₂
    have h₉ : y ⊥ φ := by
      by_contra h
      have h₁₀ : y ⊧ φ := by tauto
      have h₁₁ : z ⊢ φ := by
        have h₁₂ : y ≺ z := Ryz
        have h₁₃ : y ⊧ φ := h₁₀
        exact (V.le_mono h₁₂) _ h₁₃
      contradiction
    contradiction
  · -- Case y = z
    have h₃ : y = z := rfl
    have h₄ : y ⊧ φ := hy₁
    have h₅ : y ⊥ ψ := hy₂
    have h₆ : z ⊧ ψ := hz₁
    have h₇ : z ⊥ φ := hz₂
    -- Substitute y = z
    have h₈ : z ⊧ φ := by simpa [h₃] using h₄
    have h₉ : z ⊥ φ := hz₂
    contradiction
  · -- Case z ≺ y
    have h₃ : z ≺ y := Rzy
    have h₄ : y ⊥ ψ := hy₂
    have h₅ : y ⊧ φ := hy₁
    have h₆ : z ⊧ ψ := hz₁
    have h₇ : z ⊥ φ := hz₂
    -- Since z ≺ y and z ⊧ ψ, we would expect y ⊢ ψ, but y ⊥ ψ
    have h₈ : y ⊢ ψ := by
      have h₉ : z ≺ y := Rzy
      have h₁₀ : z ⊧ ψ := h₆
      exact (V.le_mono h₉) _ h₁₀
    contradiction
  <
